blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 952 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
